title: Subscriptions & Packages
content:
Understanding Our Pricing


Agents should be familiar with all pricing options so they can answer client questions accurately and recommend the best value. The platform offers hourly sessions, multi-session packages, and group rates.



Hourly Rate


$50 per hour for one-on-one tutoring. Includes personalized instruction, a detailed session recap, optional homework, email and text support between sessions, and regular progress tracking. Best for clients who need occasional help or want to try tutoring before committing to a package.



Multi-Session Packages


Clients who prepay for multiple sessions receive a discount. All packages expire six months from the date of purchase. Unused sessions after expiry are forfeited — agents should remind clients of this when discussing packages.


PackageSessionsPriceSavings
Bronze4 sessions$185$15
Silver8 sessions$365$35
Gold12 sessions$525$75

Package perks to mention to clients:


  • Bronze: Email support and progress reports.
  • Silver: Priority scheduling, extended email support, detailed progress tracking.
  • Gold: Premium scheduling priority, 24/7 messaging support, comprehensive progress reports, custom learning materials.


Group Sessions


$35 per student per hour for groups of two to three students studying the same subject. Ideal for siblings, classmates, or study groups. Agents should clarify that all students must be at similar grade levels and studying the same topic.



Payment Methods


We accept:


  • Cash
  • E-Transfer
  • PayPal
  • Bank Transfer

Payment is due at the time of service for hourly sessions. Package sessions must be prepaid in full before the first session is scheduled.



Common Client Questions & How to Answer


  • "Which package should I get?" — Ask how often they plan to have sessions. Once a week? Bronze (one month of sessions). Twice a week? Silver or Gold. Remind them packages expire in six months.
  • "Can I upgrade later?" — Yes. They can purchase a larger package at any time. Unused sessions from the old package remain valid until their original expiry date.
  • "What if the tutor isn't a good fit?" — They can switch tutors at any time. Package credits apply to any tutor on the platform.
  • "Do packages expire?" — Yes, six months from purchase. Encourage clients to schedule regularly to get full value.
  • "Can I get a refund?" — Refer to the Refund Policy article. Within 72 hours if no sessions booked, minus 10% admin fee.
